feed.title: Websites / HND / c / news
feed.subtitle: Feed of User Submitted Content Submitted to https://hackernewsdelta.com

entry.title: HackerNewsDelta.com released to general public!
entry.summary: Checkout the new social news and bookmarking news portal website!

entry.title: Digg on Hacker News!
entry.summary: Digg Press : We shared a link today on Hacker News in an initial effort to promote Digg.

entry.title: Digg.one REST API now alpha and in development and already working
entry.summary:
Digg.one REST API now alpha and in development and already working.

  • Read Only API v1 is Feature Complete
  • Write API v2 is Working and In active development.

If your interested in using software to post to stories and images to digg.one new REST API (aka write bots to post on your behalf) then contact us with your request for an OAUTH 2.0 Client Application Account.

Upon Application Approval you will receive basic instructions, the required authentication credentials and our platform documentation on how the software and process of using works in graphic detail. Don't like it? Drop your suggestions for improving the process and features.

entry.title: Digg Count Storage Option Development Finished
entry.summary:
Today we completed migration of the database configuration to use the soon to be open sourced voting solution plugin required for the digg sigma / digg clone projects.

With sevenx_digg extension we will include the design templates and datatype needed to vote for content objects within our lamp php cms eZ Publish 6.

With the digg clone project we will be releasing our full current site sources and the full mysql database required to start people off with a reference platform to use to build their own digg clone based websites. The digg clone project home page is also coming soon to https://clone.digg.one

entry.title: Digg Sigma is now digg.one and available on GitHub for free downloads
entry.summary: Digg Sigma is now digg.one and the software powering this platform is open source under the GNU GPLv2 (or later version) license and available on GitHub!

entry.title: Digg Sigma a user submitted news website!
entry.summary: Thank you for joining us today as the Digg Sigma website is now available to the world and ready for your news stories.

entry.title: Digg Sigma the new digg
entry.summary: Thank you for joining us today as the Digg Sigma website is now available to the world and ready for your news stories.
